twitter.post: Ever find yourself deep in a news story but still have questions? Our AI search lets you ask specific things and gives you answers with links to the sources. It is a much faster way to get the full picture. HEADLINNE.com #news #AI

linkedin.title: Most news feeds are broken because they treat everyone the same.
linkedin.body:
It is frustrating to open a news app and see headlines that have nothing to do with your life or your interests. The standard approach is to guess what you might like based on broad categories. But human curiosity is much more specific than a category like technology or politics.

We built Headlinne to change that. Instead of guessing, our recommendation engine works by paying attention to what you actually engage with over time. It learns from your habits. If you read a piece about urban planning in your city, it understands you are interested in local policy, not just generic city news. It is about nuance.

This is not about trapping you in a bubble. It is about cutting through the noise so you can find the stories that matter to you. When the technology works well, it feels less like an algorithm and more like a helpful editor who knows what you like to read.

We believe technology should save you time, not waste it.
linkedin.cta: You can see how it works for yourself at HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Pauline Hanson's economic strategy
slides.explanation: One Nation is gaining traction by linking high housing costs directly to immigration levels. It is a simple message that is finding an audience among Australians worried about the economy.

slides.headline: AI vs. clean energy
slides.explanation: The massive energy needs of AI data centers are leading to more fossil fuel use. Now, renewable energy advocates are pushing to ensure these power-hungry facilities use cleaner sources instead.

slides.headline: US strikes follow Strait of Hormuz closure
slides.explanation: The US has launched new military strikes after Iran blocked the vital Strait of Hormuz. This follows a recent attack on a ship passing through the area.

slides.headline: Suspect released in Widdecombe case
slides.explanation: UK police have released a 26-year-old man who was arrested following the death of former politician Ann Widdecombe. She was found dead in her home earlier this week.

slides.headline: Poland plans WW2 memorial
slides.explanation: The Polish Prime Minister has promised a new memorial for victims of World War Two mass killings. This move addresses a long-standing point of tension between Warsaw and Kyiv.

instagram.caption: Stay informed with today's top global stories. From energy debates to international tensions, we are breaking down the news you need to know. Download Headlinne to get the full picture every day. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: Top hiking boots for your next trip
slides.explanation: If you are planning to hit the trails, Wired has put together a guide on the best boots for everything from park walks to serious mountain climbs.

slides.headline: Meta pulls back on Instagram AI tool
slides.explanation: Meta is removing an AI feature from Instagram after users complained. The company admitted the tool missed the mark and decided to take it down.

slides.headline: Instagram blocks AI deepfake tool
slides.explanation: Meta has officially deactivated a feature that let users create AI images of public Instagram accounts. This follows concerns about how the tool was being used.

slides.headline: Is the new Black Flag remake any good?
slides.explanation: Fans have waited 13 years for this, and now the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake is finally here. The BBC took a look to see if it lives up to the hype.

slides.headline: The viral Nopia synth is almost here
slides.explanation: After gaining massive attention online in 2023, the Nopia synthesizer is nearly ready for release. The creators recently showed off the finished product.

instagram.caption: From major tech updates at Meta to long-awaited game remakes, here is the tech news you need to know today. Swipe through for the latest headlines. Stay informed with Headlinne. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
